examples: The new partnership will be established at first in Guyana, India, Malawi, Nigeria and Zambia.
Malawi took a giant step backward.
India wants uranium from Malawi and Niger for nuclear power.
Lake Malawi is classified as a Unesco World Heritage site due to its diversity of endemic fish.
Sediment cores from Lake Malawi in southern Africa show colder weather from 1570 to 1820.
